mapper.sql: id, product_id, rule_version, rule_name, is_active, effective_start_time, effective_end_time, remark, gs_min_establish_months, gs_min_registered_capital, gs_min_paid_in_capital, gs_max_legal_rep_change_count_2y, gs_min_legal_rep_change_gap_months, gs_min_legal_rep_share_ratio, gs_allow_legal_rep_no_joint_liability, gs_allow_shareholder_replace_joint_liability, gs_min_shareholder_replace_share_ratio, tax_min_tax_months_12m, tax_min_tax_months_24m, tax_max_zero_declare_streak, tax_min_tax_amount_12m, tax_min_tax_amount_ytd, tax_min_tax_amount_last_year, tax_max_tax_burden_ratio, tax_min_tax_burden_ratio_yoy, tax_min_total_declares, jud_reject_if_major_lawsuit, jud_reject_if_executed, jud_reject_if_dishonest_person, jud_reject_if_equity_frozen, jud_max_execution_count_24m, jud_max_court_announcement_count_12m, jud_max_admin_penalty_count_12m, jud_reject_if_major_judicial_risk, jud_reject_if_restriction_high_consumption, ind_match_mode_code, ind_max_risk_level, ind_require_enterprise_tag, ind_min_tag_valid_months, ind_require_region_match, ind_require_actual_business_address, ind_reject_if_high_pollution, ind_reject_if_high_energy_consumption, ind_reject_if_sensitive_industry, ec_max_total_liability, ec_max_credit_liability, ec_max_mortgage_liability, ec_max_external_guarantee_amount, ec_max_loan_org_count, ec_max_query_count_6m, ec_max_overdue_count_12m, ec_max_overdue_months_24m, ec_min_no_overdue_days, ec_allow_abnormal_credit_account, pc_max_query_count_1m, pc_max_query_count_3m, pc_max_query_count_6m, pc_max_loan_query_count_1m, pc_max_credit_card_query_count_1m, pc_max_overdue_count_12m, pc_max_overdue_months_24m, pc_max_total_overdue_terms_5y, pc_max_non_bank_loan_count, pc_max_credit_card_utilization, ext_json, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yw_product_rule
product_id, rule_version, rule_name, is_active, effective_start_time, effective_end_time, remark, gs_min_establish_months, gs_min_registered_capital, gs_min_paid_in_capital, gs_max_legal_rep_change_count_2y, gs_min_legal_rep_change_gap_months, gs_min_legal_rep_share_ratio, gs_allow_legal_rep_no_joint_liability, gs_allow_shareholder_replace_joint_liability, gs_min_shareholder_replace_share_ratio, tax_min_tax_months_12m, tax_min_tax_months_24m, tax_max_zero_declare_streak, tax_min_tax_amount_12m, tax_min_tax_amount_ytd, tax_min_tax_amount_last_year, tax_max_tax_burden_ratio, tax_min_tax_burden_ratio_yoy, tax_min_total_declares, jud_reject_if_major_lawsuit, jud_reject_if_executed, jud_reject_if_dishonest_person, jud_reject_if_equity_frozen, jud_max_execution_count_24m, jud_max_court_announcement_count_12m, jud_max_admin_penalty_count_12m, jud_reject_if_major_judicial_risk, jud_reject_if_restriction_high_consumption, ind_match_mode_code, ind_max_risk_level, ind_require_enterprise_tag, ind_min_tag_valid_months, ind_require_region_match, ind_require_actual_business_address, ind_reject_if_high_pollution, ind_reject_if_high_energy_consumption, ind_reject_if_sensitive_industry, ec_max_total_liability, ec_max_credit_liability, ec_max_mortgage_liability, ec_max_external_guarantee_amount, ec_max_loan_org_count, ec_max_query_count_6m, ec_max_overdue_count_12m, ec_max_overdue_months_24m, ec_min_no_overdue_days, ec_allow_abnormal_credit_account, pc_max_query_count_1m, pc_max_query_count_3m, pc_max_query_count_6m, pc_max_loan_query_count_1m, pc_max_credit_card_query_count_1m, pc_max_overdue_count_12m, pc_max_overdue_months_24m, pc_max_total_overdue_terms_5y, pc_max_non_bank_loan_count, pc_max_credit_card_utilization, ext_json,
#{productId}, #{ruleVersion}, #{ruleName}, #{isActive}, #{effectiveStartTime}, #{effectiveEndTime}, #{remark}, #{gsMinEstablishMonths}, #{gsMinRegisteredCapital}, #{gsMinPaidInCapital}, #{gsMaxLegalRepChangeCount2y}, #{gsMinLegalRepChangeGapMonths}, #{gsMinLegalRepShareRatio}, #{gsAllowLegalRepNoJointLiability}, #{gsAllowShareholderReplaceJointLiability}, #{gsMinShareholderReplaceShareRatio}, #{taxMinTaxMonths12m}, #{taxMinTaxMonths24m}, #{taxMaxZeroDeclareStreak}, #{taxMinTaxAmount12m}, #{taxMinTaxAmountYtd}, #{taxMinTaxAmountLastYear}, #{taxMaxTaxBurdenRatio}, #{taxMinTaxBurdenRatioYoy}, #{taxMinTotalDeclares}, #{judRejectIfMajorLawsuit}, #{judRejectIfExecuted}, #{judRejectIfDishonestPerson}, #{judRejectIfEquityFrozen}, #{judMaxExecutionCount24m}, #{judMaxCourtAnnouncementCount12m}, #{judMaxAdminPenaltyCount12m}, #{judRejectIfMajorJudicialRisk}, #{judRejectIfRestrictionHighConsumption}, #{indMatchModeCode}, #{indMaxRiskLevel}, #{indRequireEnterpriseTag}, #{indMinTagValidMonths}, #{indRequireRegionMatch}, #{indRequireActualBusinessAddress}, #{indRejectIfHighPollution}, #{indRejectIfHighEnergyConsumption}, #{indRejectIfSensitiveIndustry}, #{ecMaxTotalLiability}, #{ecMaxCreditLiability}, #{ecMaxMortgageLiability}, #{ecMaxExternalGuaranteeAmount}, #{ecMaxLoanOrgCount}, #{ecMaxQueryCount6m}, #{ecMaxOverdueCount12m}, #{ecMaxOverdueMonths24m}, #{ecMinNoOverdueDays}, #{ecAllowAbnormalCreditAccount}, #{pcMaxQueryCount1m}, #{pcMaxQueryCount3m}, #{pcMaxQueryCount6m}, #{pcMaxLoanQueryCount1m}, #{pcMaxCreditCardQueryCount1m}, #{pcMaxOverdueCount12m}, #{pcMaxOverdueMonths24m}, #{pcMaxTotalOverdueTerms5y}, #{pcMaxNonBankLoanCount}, #{pcMaxCreditCardUtilization}, #{extJson},
